title: Virella Systems
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Virella Systems''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer, known particularly for its cargo haulage craft, such as the [[Virella Systems cargo freighter|Cargo freighter]] and [[Cargo tanker]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Shipwrights]]
